title: Excessive Security Deposit
check_description: Flag deposits that appear excessive compared with the stated monthly rent; the exact lawful cap must be verified for the agreement and applicable tenancy regime.
plain_explanation_template: The deposit appears unusually high compared with the monthly rent and should be checked against applicable local law.

title: Unreasonable Lock-in Period
check_description: Flag lengthy lock-in periods or early-termination penalties that appear disproportionate.
plain_explanation_template: This clause may make leaving early unusually expensive or difficult.

title: Insufficient Eviction Notice
check_description: Flag clauses that allow immediate eviction or an apparently inadequate landlord notice period.
plain_explanation_template: The landlord may be claiming a right to make you leave without adequate notice.

title: Unilateral Rent Increase
check_description: Flag clauses permitting unilateral or unspecified rent increases without adequate notice or an agreed formula.
plain_explanation_template: The landlord may be able to raise rent without a clear limit or notice process.

title: Hidden Maintenance Cost Pass-through
check_description: Flag broad, uncapped, or undefined maintenance and building-cost pass-throughs.
plain_explanation_template: You may have to pay costs that are not clearly listed or capped.

title: Waiver of Essential Repairs
check_description: Flag attempts to make the tenant waive habitability or essential-repair responsibilities that may remain with the landlord.
plain_explanation_template: This may shift responsibility for essential safety or habitability repairs to you.

title: Restricted Legal Recourse
check_description: Flag dispute clauses that purport to override non-waivable tenant remedies or impose one-sided arbitration.
plain_explanation_template: This may limit where or how you can enforce your rights.

title: Absolute Subletting Ban
check_description: Flag absolute subletting bans for human review; enforceability depends on the agreement and applicable local law.
plain_explanation_template: This completely prevents subletting, which may require legal review in your circumstances.

title: Potentially Discriminatory Restriction
check_description: Flag occupancy restrictions tied to protected or sensitive personal characteristics for urgent human review.
plain_explanation_template: This condition may discriminate based on personal or family status.

title: Unclear Registration Status
check_description: Flag language stating that registration is unnecessary or unclear, especially for longer tenancy terms.
plain_explanation_template: The agreement's registration status may affect how it can be relied on or enforced.

title: Unannounced Landlord Entry
check_description: Flag clauses allowing entry without reasonable notice except in genuine emergencies.
plain_explanation_template: The landlord may enter without warning, reducing your privacy.

title: Automatic Deposit Forfeiture
check_description: Flag automatic or total deposit forfeiture unrelated to documented loss or damage.
plain_explanation_template: You could lose the whole deposit automatically, even if the landlord's actual loss is smaller.

title: Utility Disconnection Remedy
check_description: Flag clauses permitting essential utilities to be disconnected as a self-help remedy.
plain_explanation_template: The landlord claims the right to stop an essential service, which needs urgent review.

title: Unlimited or Excessive Late Fee
check_description: Flag uncapped, compounding, or apparently disproportionate late-payment charges.
plain_explanation_template: Late charges may grow quickly or be disproportionate to the delayed payment.

title: One-sided Indemnity
check_description: Flag broad clauses making the tenant responsible for nearly every landlord loss or claim.
plain_explanation_template: You may be made responsible for losses beyond those you actually caused.

title: No Rent Receipts
check_description: Flag attempts to avoid giving payment evidence or receipts.
plain_explanation_template: You may not receive reliable proof of rent payments.

title: Structural Damage Shifted to Tenant
check_description: Flag broad transfer of pre-existing, structural, or building-level repair costs to the tenant.
plain_explanation_template: You may have to pay for building problems you did not cause.
